description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and clusters of mature trees on either side. The house features a prominent, multi-gabled hip roof with dormer windows and a central chimney. The front facade is symmetrical, with a covered porch supported by columns, a set of steps leading to the main entry, and stonework accents around the base. Large windows are arranged in balanced rows, and the rear of the house includes a raised deck or patio area. The driveway leads up to the house, providing access to the front steps and possibly a side garage. The landscaping is well-maintained, with clear separation between the house, driveway, and green spaces.
description: A two-story, hip-roofed house with a symmetrical front porch, stone accents, and mature trees on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, steps, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the driveway, side elevation, and a large deck or patio area behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the raised deck, back steps, and extensive tree coverage on the left side.
description_view_3: Side/front angled view showing the driveway, porch, and the arrangement of trees and lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, stone steps, and decorative stonework at the base
